summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Store Launch Platform feature. Backend: 21/21 API tests passed. Frontend: All store flows working - Build Shop modal, store detail tabs, preview page, Shopify export. Full end-to-end flow tested: Discover product -> Build Shop -> Choose name -> Preview -> Create Store -> Manage from My Stores.

issues: Recharts width/height console warnings during initial render - charts render correctly after layout stabilizes

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Backend: GET /api/stores/limits returns correct limits for starter(1), pro(5), elite(unlimited)
Backend: POST /api/stores/generate generates store content with name suggestions, tagline, headline, bullet points, pricing, branding, FAQs, policies
Backend: POST /api/stores creates store with generated content and product
Backend: GET /api/stores?user_id returns user's stores with product counts
Backend: GET /api/stores/{id} returns store with products
Backend: PUT /api/stores/{id} updates store name, tagline, headline, status
Backend: DELETE /api/stores/{id} deletes store and products
Backend: GET /api/stores/{id}/products returns store products
Backend: POST /api/stores/{id}/regenerate/{productId} regenerates AI copy
Backend: GET /api/stores/{id}/preview returns store preview data
Backend: GET /api/stores/{id}/export?format=shopify returns Shopify-compatible export
Backend: Plan limits enforcement - starter plan blocked after 1 store
Backend: User isolation - users only see their own stores
Frontend: My Stores page loads with store cards, status badges, product counts
Frontend: Store Detail page with Overview, Products, Branding, Content tabs
Frontend: Store branding tab with color pickers and style display
Frontend: Store products tab showing AI-generated content with regenerate button
Frontend: Store Preview page with full storefront layout
Frontend: Build Shop button opens modal on Product Detail page
Frontend: Store Builder modal Step 1 - name suggestions, custom input, regenerate
Frontend: Store Builder modal Step 2 - preview with branding colors and bullet points
Frontend: Store creation flow completes and redirects to store detail
Frontend: Shopify export downloads JSON file
critical_code_review_comments: AI generation uses rules-based logic as documented (not external LLM) - working correctly
Store limits properly enforced via backend validation
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test stores during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Store Launch Platform feature fully tested. All APIs working: /api/stores (CRUD), /api/stores/generate, /api/stores/{id}/products, /api/stores/{id}/regenerate/{productId}, /api/stores/{id}/preview, /api/stores/{id}/export. Frontend flows: Discover -> Product Detail -> Build Shop modal -> Store Detail/Preview. Plan limits working (starter=1, pro=5, elite=unlimited).

mocked_apis.AI Store Generation: RULES-BASED - Uses deterministic logic in StoreGenerator class, not external LLM
mocked_apis.Frontend Auth: MOCKED - Uses localStorage DEMO_USER in AuthContext.jsx

features_tested.store_creation: Working - Build Shop button triggers AI generation modal
features_tested.ai_generation: Working - Name suggestions, tagline, headline, product copy, bullet points, pricing all generated
features_tested.plan_limits: Working - Starter limited to 1, Pro to 5, Elite unlimited
features_tested.my_stores: Working - Lists user stores with status, product count, actions
features_tested.store_detail: Working - 4 tabs (Overview, Products, Branding, Content) with edit functionality
features_tested.store_preview: Working - Full storefront preview with product, pricing, FAQs
features_tested.user_isolation: Working - Users only see their own stores
features_tested.regenerate_copy: Working - Regenerates AI content for store products
